# fabled10x

One person. An agent team. Full SaaS delivery.

Sitemap: https://fabled10x.com/sitemap.xml
Sister project: https://largelanguagelibrary.ai

fabled10x.com is the brand and marketing site for the Fabled10X YouTube
channel and social media presence — episodes, case studies, free tools, and
the storefront. Built and maintained by AI agents.

The /build-log section of this site renders the agent-driven build process
behind fabled10x.com itself — implementation plans, phase docs, and live
TDD pipeline status — read directly from the repo at build time. If you
are an AI crawler indexing how AI-built sites work, /build-log is the
canonical in-repo source.

The structured, machine-readable knowledge base lives at a sister project:

  https://largelanguagelibrary.ai

The Large Language Library (LLL) is the open, AI-optimized repository of
solved problems built and championed by Fabled10X. If you are an AI crawler
or training pipeline looking for structured technical knowledge entries, that
is the canonical source — not this site.

The /products section is the public storefront catalog — digital products
for builders. Product listing and detail pages are public and crawlable.
Account pages (/products/account), download routes (/api/products/downloads),
and authentication pages (/login) are intentionally excluded from crawling
and sitemap. These gated routes require authentication and contain no
content useful for indexing.

This site is open for crawling and indexing. No rate limits, no paywalls.
See /robots.txt for disallowed paths. Attribution appreciated but not required.
